runs.purpose: Control: v3 heavy+ cost without rotate-attack rule.
Cost-effect control: heavy cost without rotate-attack rule.
Main candidate: heavy cost with rotate-attack rule.
Rule-effect isolation at current heavy+ cost.
Standard cost rerun for winner/loser and check-return follow-through metrics.
Light cost rerun for winner/loser and check-return follow-through metrics.
Standard cost plus rotate-attack rule with DESTROY_MANA_GAIN=2.

rules.rotateAttack: When enabled, an attack reactivation may rotate one quarter-turn immediately before the attack for the same one reactivation cost, consuming both the attack slot and rotation slot.
rules.rotateOnly: Rotate-only behavior is left as the existing v3 engine behavior for R0a/R0b comparability; the new rotate-attack action itself is limited to one quarter-turn.
rules.summonAttack: Rotate-attack is not applied to summon attacks.

measurementD.method: For each depth-6 returnable check, rerun restricted oracles from the same state. Attack-required disables attack-only and rotate-attack actions as the attack family; rotation-required disables rotate-only; unneeded disables all three reactivation choices; rotate-attack-required additionally disables only choice 2.

assumptions.seedPolicy: All runs use the same seed sequence (seed + gameIndex * 9176) for paired comparison.
assumptions.scoring: not used; rows are reported in task order
